query:
UPDATE business_plans SET 
  entityName = 'The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC',
  entityType = 'LLC',
  state = 'Delaware'
WHERE entityName = 'L.A.W.S. Collective';

UPDATE business_plans SET 
  entityName = 'LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC',
  entityType = 'LLC',
  state = 'Delaware'
WHERE entityName = 'LuvOnPurpose LLC';

UPDATE business_plans SET 
  state = 'Georgia'
WHERE entityName = 'Real-Eye-Nation LLC';
